<?php namespace Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\Reducers; use Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\ReducedArgument\ReducedArgument; use Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\ReducedArgument\ReducedArgumentContract; use Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\ReducedArgument\UnReducedArgument; use Stringable; class StringableArgumentReducer implements ArgumentReducer { public function execute($argument): ReducedArgumentContract { if (! $argument instanceof Stringable) { return UnReducedArgument::create(); } return new ReducedArgument( (string) $argument, get_class($argument), ); } }
